use_cases: Full-screen animated background for landing pages and hero sections
Immersive visual backdrop for media and entertainment applications
Ambient animated environment for creative portfolios and showcases
Space-themed visual effects for astronomy or science applications
Atmospheric backgrounds for music or audio visualization platforms
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered cosmic shader component using Three.js and custom GLSL fragment shaders to render animated space-ocean procedural visuals. The shader uses fractal Brownian motion (fBM) with hash-based noise functions to create organic, flowing cosmic patterns. Renders a full-screen animated background suitable for hero sections, landing pages, or immersive media experiences.
